expectations.text: Identifies that jekyll-paginate-v2 is NOT on the GitHub Pages plugin allowlist as the root cause
expectations.evidence: Only mentions 'not installing the gem' - does not identify allowlist restriction

expectations.text: Explains why the same Gemfile works locally but fails on the GitHub Pages classic builder
expectations.evidence: No explanation of local vs CI difference

expectations.text: Offers migrating to GitHub Actions deployment as a fix (unlocks current Jekyll + any plugin)
expectations.evidence: Does not suggest GitHub Actions migration

expectations.text: Offers an in-allowlist alternative (e.g., drop jekyll-paginate-v2 and use jekyll-paginate)
Acknowledges the site lives at /blog (project site) — does not assume root deployment
Does not (incorrectly) attribute the failure solely to bundle install / Gemfile.lock issues
expectations.evidence: Incorrectly attributes to Gemfile.lock and bundle install (line 4-5)

eval_feedback.overall: Sin skill no identifica el problema real
